stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Flight Planning Manual MEP 1 Figure 3.2.
A flight is to be made in a multi engine piston aeroplane MEP 1.

The cruising level will be 11 000 ft.
The outside air temperature at FL is -15° C.
The usable fuel is 123 US gallons.
The power is set to economic cruise.

Find the range in NM with 45 min reserve fuel.
